memory_entries.text: SQLite product DB recurring schema: g1 is Office Products (items_g1 main_cat dominated by Office Products), g2 electronics, g3 likely musical instruments. Tables: items_g*, fdbk_g*, attrs_g1/g3, taxn_g1/g2. In fdbk_g1, vrf INTEGER uses 0 for missing text verification label and 1 for present/verified. Archived/no longer offered for office g1 is attrs_g1 attr_key='Is Discontinued By Manufacturer' with lower(attr_val)='yes'.
